creator: phil@krylov.eu
text:
(In reply to Alan Somers from comment #32)
I was referring to https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/issues/11900 and the related PRs: #12724, #12745, #12746.
Looking at this issue once again, I see it mentions nullfs, so it's not clear if the problem has been fixed with the changes on OpenZFS side.
